entity.label: Uzzen-sheerah
entity.subtitle: City
entity.description: A town probably near Beth-horon. It derived its name from the daughter of Ephraim (1 Chr. 7:24).

nodes.label: Uzzen-sheerah
nodes.description: A town probably near Beth-horon. It derived its name from the daughter of Ephraim (1 Chr. 7:24).

verses.text: (And his daughter was Sherah, who built Bethhoron the nether, and the upper, and Uzzensherah.)
